name: web-research
description: Research a topic using web search and produce a structured summary with sources. Use when the user asks to research something, find information about a topic, compare options, or investigate a question that requires up-to-date web knowledge.
author: pantheon

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: The topic or question to research

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: How deep to go: quick, standard, or thorough
